title: Random Drops
description: Destroy any block, (almost) any way and someday, mobs too, and get a random drop!

# Random Drops

I'd love to see how my mod is being used, if you're a content creator and used my mod, please fill out [this form.](https://forms.gle/qwFF7ezNAj1wRoWm9)

Otherwise, here's everything you need to know about this mod:

**Random Drops** changes Minecraft by making every block drop something random, it's great for videos, competitions, or both combined.

[![Available for Fabric](https://static.ixvipcs.com/FabricBanner.png?v=2)](https://modrinth.com/mod/randomizeddrops?loader=fabric#download)
[![Available for NeoForge](https://static.ixvipcs.com/NeoForgeBanner.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/randomizeddrops?loader=neoforge#download)

## Features
- **Randomized Drops:** Any block can drop any item or block.  
- **Commands:** Operators can control block drops with `/rd` commands:
  - `/rd reload` — reshuffle all block drops
  - `/rd on` — enable random drops
  - `/rd off` — disable random drops

<details>
<summary>Legacy Commands</summary>
  
### These are old commands that only work in specific versions:
- `/rd true` — enable random drops (version 1.1.0)
- `/rd false` — disable random drops (version 1.1.0)
- `/redrop` — reshuffle all block drops (versions 1.0.0 - 1.0.5)
</details>

- **Best in Multiplayer:** Play with other players and compete in challenges.    
- **Good for Content Creation:** Great for recording videos or live streaming.  
- **Works in All Modes:** In single-player, the mod is only needed client-side. In multiplayer, only the server needs the mod.

## Why Download?
Random Drops was created to fill the gaps where similar mods fell short, it: 
- has easy controls
- works on every block
- has few bugs
- has almost zero performance impact
- is quickly updated when new Minecraft versions are released

### Have fun!
<small>-Herobrinee11196</small>
